StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(t.title) AS movie_title FROM job.keyword AS k, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.title AS t WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%' AND mi.info IN ('Sweden', 'Norway', 'Germany', 'Denmark', 'Swedish', 'Denish', 'Norwegian', 'German', 'USA', 'American') AND t.production_year > 1990 AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND k.id = mk.keyword_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='American' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Denish' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Denmark' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='German' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Germany' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Norway' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Norwegian' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Sweden' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Swedish' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='USA'
